name: Bank Of Iberia
description_short: Family-owned community bank serving Iberia and Waynesville, Missouri since 1899, offering full-service personal and business banking with three generations of local ownership.
description_long:
Bank of Iberia is a locally owned, full-service community bank headquartered in Iberia, Missouri, with a second branch in Waynesville. Established in 1899, the bank has been operated by the Tritten family for three generations, making it one of the longest-running family-owned banking institutions in central Missouri.

The bank operates two physical locations. The main branch sits at 841 East Highway 42 in Iberia (65486), while the Waynesville branch is located at 201 Cash James Loop (65583). Both locations offer lobby and drive-thru services Monday through Saturday, with extended drive-thru hours until 5:00 p.m. on weekdays.

As a community-focused institution, Bank of Iberia provides standard personal and commercial banking services including checking and savings accounts, lending products, and business banking. The bank emphasizes personal relationships and accessibility — customers can reach the Iberia branch at (573) 793-2224 and the Waynesville branch at (573) 774-3110.

Bank of Iberia's positioning as a multi-generational family-owned bank distinguishes it from larger regional and national competitors. For residents and small business owners in the Iberia and Waynesville areas who prefer working with a locally owned institution where decisions are made by people who live in the same community, Bank of Iberia offers a straightforward alternative to corporate banking.
